hero.subtitle: Type 3x faster by speaking. Parla runs in the background — press a hotkey to voice-type in any app. Filler words removed, grammar fixed, output formatted automatically.

speed.subtitle: Average typing speed is 40 WPM. Natural speech is 150 WPM. Parla gives you 3x the speed while producing cleaner text than you'd type.
speed.sameSpeed: Same speed as speech-to-text, but output is polished and formatted

features.subtitle: Parla understands your intent and outputs what you actually mean.
features.smartCleanupDesc: Automatically removes filler words like "um" and "uh", merges repetitions, and detects self-corrections. Speak casually, get polished output.
features.contextAwareDesc: Formal for emails, casual for chat, technical for code comments. Parla adapts tone based on the active app.
features.languagesDesc: Switch between languages freely, even mix them in one sentence. Whisper auto-detects language with no manual setup.
features.fastDesc: Less than 1 second from releasing the hotkey to text appearing. Groq-accelerated inference runs 200x faster than real-time.
features.privacyDesc: Audio is discarded immediately after processing. Never stored, never used for training. Local offline model support coming soon.
features.globalHotkeyDesc: Custom hotkey (default Fn) works in any app. Press and hold to speak, release to auto-insert text at cursor position.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to start. One second to finish.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Hold your configured hotkey (e.g. Fn) in any app and start speaking. Talk naturally, no need to avoid filler words.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Whisper transcribes your speech, then an LLM removes filler words, fixes grammar, and formats the output. All in under 1 second.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Release the hotkey and polished text is automatically inserted at your cursor position. No copy-paste needed, writes directly into the active app.

worksEverywhere.title: Works in any app
worksEverywhere.subtitle: Parla runs silently in the background. Press the hotkey to voice-type in whichever app you're using.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.freeFeature1: 30 minutes of voice input per day

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Parla uses Whisper large-v3, one of the most accurate speech recognition engines. It handles accents, background noise, and multilingual mixing. The AI polish layer further cleans up any remaining filler words and grammar issues.
faq.a2: Currently macOS is supported. Windows is in development. You can also try the core features via the web demo.
faq.a3: 100+ languages via the Whisper model, including Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and more. You can mix multiple languages in the same sentence with no manual switching.
faq.a4: Yes. Audio is discarded immediately after cloud processing. Never stored, never used for training. Full offline mode is planned for the future.
faq.q5: How is this different from built-in dictation?
faq.a5: Built-in dictation transcribes word-for-word, including all the "um"s, false starts, and mistakes. Parla adds an AI layer: it understands your intent, removes filler, auto-formats, and outputs text ready to use.
faq.a6: Yes. The onboarding flow guides you through hotkey setup. Default is Fn, but you can change it to any key combination you prefer.

cta.title1: Stop typing one letter at a time.
cta.subtitle: 3x faster writing. Download free and try it now.

app.holdSpace: Hold {key} to speak, release to finish
app.orClickMic: Or click the mic button. Text is auto-copied to your clipboard.
app.noHistory: No recordings yet. Start speaking to see your history.
app.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow mic access in your browser settings.
app.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
